title: dahlia australis var. liebmannii
intro: Dahlia australis var. liebmannii, commonly known as the Mexican dahlia, is a plant species belonging to the dahlia family and is native to Mexico. The plant's roots and tubers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dahlia australis var. liebmannii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant's roots and tubers are typically used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
